name: Oriental Short Rib Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine green onions, soy sauce, water, sesame oil, brown sugar, toasted sesame seeds, minced garlic, grated ginger, ground red pepper, and crushed red pepper pods.
2. Place beef short ribs in a large plastic bag. Add the marinade, turning to coat the ribs evenly.
3. Seal the bag securely and marinate in the refrigerator for 4-6 hours (or overnight if desired), turning occasionally.
4. Remove the ribs from the marinade and reserve the marinade for serving.
5. Place the ribs on a grill over medium coals. Cook, covered, for 10-12 minutes, turning once and brushing with marinade before serving.
6. Makes 12 servings.
Short ribs can be ordered from retailers. They are cut 3/8- to 1/2 inch thick. Each has three cross-cut rib bones.
